description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a cross-gabled roof covered in dark shingles. The exterior walls are clad in a combination of brown siding and brickwork along the lower portion, giving it a warm, suburban appearance. Large windows are present on the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. A small, raised porch with a tiled surface is visible at the front entrance, providing a welcoming entryway. The property is set on a rectangular plot with a driveway leading to a side entrance and a fenced boundary on one side. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of North American suburban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a cross-gabled dark shingle roof, brown siding, brick base, large windows, and a small front porch on a rectangular lot.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the brown siding, brick base, and the cross-gabled roof with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the small front porch, large window, and the main entrance area.
description_view_2: Angled view showing both the front porch, large front window, driveway, and part of the fenced boundary.
description_view_3: Direct front view with the prominent large window, front porch, and driveway leading up to the entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing window and side windows
